The residence

Bérénice

A second-floor two-bedroom residence of over 140 square metres gross at the centre of Green Coast, Palasë. Family scale in the stone village quarter — steps from the central plaza, the pools and the Blue Flag beach that has made this coast Albania's most sought-after address.

Location within the resort

Bérénice · Zona G8, Green Coast Resort

Explore the residence

Walk it, room by room

Tap any room on the plan to see its size.

Position within Green Coast

Where Bérénice sits

Bérénice sits in the upper eastern quarter of the village, set among garden courtyards above the central plaza. The hotel is a short walk north-west, the parking entrance across the village, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.

Location & setting

Life at Green Coast

Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.

Upper eastern quarter, among garden courtyards
